name: No witnesses to my crash but AI has my version—problem for Houston court?
description: Yes—uncorroborated AI weak; get hard evidence.[1]

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my crash but AI has my version—problem for Houston court?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes—uncorroborated AI weak; get hard evidence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Big problem—solo AI narrative lacks corroboration, easily challenged.[1] Key factors: hearsay risk; bias appearance; black box sourcing.[1] Use dashcam/traffic cams; medicals as evidence; depose parties.[1] Real proof trumps speculation.
